sourceRef.citation: Justin Kian Ming Wyss et al. 2028

statement.en: Towards smarter prevention : advances in soft sensors and physiological understanding of pressure injuries
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a forthcoming thesis (dated 2026, future-dated or recent embargo) with abstract content unavailable for evaluation. The claims about soft sensors and pressure injury prevention cannot be assessed without access to the full text. The work is provisional/under-embargo status.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 圧力と時間の対話が、組織の崩壊を予言する。
